zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith de Haute-Lorraine於1171年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希時，她的父親Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine28歲，母親Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast26歲。她和Heinrich III Graf von Salm至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1244年在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾薩爾姆享年73歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith de Haute-Lorraine was born in 1171, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, her father, Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine, was 28 and her mother, Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast, was 26. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Heinrich III Graf von Salm. She died in 1244, in Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith de Haute-Lorraine est née en 1171, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Heinrich III Graf von Salm. Elle est décédée en 1244, à Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judith de Haute-Lorraine 1171 in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine 28 und ihre Mutter Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast 26. Sie hatte mit Heinrich III Graf von Salm mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1244 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Salm, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich.

Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Heinrich III Graf von Salm. Morì nel 1244, nel Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, all'età di 73 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Judith de Haute-Lorraine(이)가 1171년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Heinrich III Graf von Salm(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1244년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 살름에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith de Haute-Lorraine родилась в 1171 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast, 26. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Heinrich III Graf von Salm. Она умерла в 1244 г. в местности салм, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция в возрасте 73 лет.
